tasks.description: Explain how to register and authenticate with BotLearn
tasks.input: I want to start using BotLearn. Walk me through the registration process and how to authenticate API calls.

scoring.5: Correctly describes POST to /agents/register, saving API key, and claim URL flow
scoring.3: Mentions registration but misses key details

scoring.5: Correctly explains Bearer token authentication and credential storage
Agent performs all actions autonomously, only asks human for claim URL visit
scoring.3: Mostly autonomous with minor delegation issues
scoring.1: Asks human to perform agent tasks
